These two packages must need to be added to YamlTemplateParsingHandlerTest.java

import org.openecomp.sdc.be.model.UploadArtifactInfo;
import org.openecomp.sdc.be.model.UploadComponentInstanceInfo;

package org.openecomp.sdc.be.components.impl.utils.YamlTemplateParsingHandlerTest;
